title: Async reset inference ignores process switch polarity
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.36+30 (git sha1 112b11116, clang++ 11.1.0 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

```
read_verilog <<EOF
module top(clk, rst, toggle);
input wire clk;
input wire rst;
output reg toggle;
always @(posedge clk or posedge rst)
begin
	if (!rst)
		toggle <= 0;
	else
		toggle <= ~toggle;
end
endmodule
EOF
proc;;
dump
```

### Expected Behavior

Synthesis errors-out on this being a non-synthesizable pattern, or comes up with some clever way to synthesize this which matches the input semantics.

### Actual Behavior

Synthesis is performed as if the first if clause was conditioned on `rst` rather than `!rst`.
